summary: Joel announces he will be on vacation from July 19-29 and shares his policy of not checking email or the web while away. He also provides a brief update on the translation project for his articles, noting that if all volunteers follow through, there will be at least 210 translated articles across 38 languages.
key_points: Joel enforces a strict no-email, no-web policy during vacations
The Joel on Software translation project had grown to potentially 210 articles in 38 languages
The post reflects the early-2000s blogging culture of posting even minor personal updates
money_quotes: My new policy is that I don't check email or the web while I'm on vacation.
key_insight: Disconnecting fully from work during vacation is a deliberate policy worth establishing and announcing.
